fields.name: _id
fields.description: The unique identifier of the integration record in the database. This is automatically generated.

fields.name: _environmentId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the environment associated with this integration. This links to the Environment collection.

fields.name: _organizationId
fields.description: The unique identifier for the organization that owns this integration. This links to the Organization collection.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the integration, which is used to identify it in the user interface.

fields.name: identifier
fields.description: A unique string identifier for the integration, often used for API calls or internal references.

fields.name: providerId
fields.description: The identifier for the provider of the integration (e.g., "mailgun", "twilio").

fields.name: channel
fields.description: The channel type for the integration, which defines how it communicates (e.g., email, SMS). Not set for agent-kind integrations.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Distinguishes delivery integrations from agent-runtime integrations. Defaults to "delivery". Agent integrations do not have a channel.

fields.name: credentials
fields.description: The decrypted credentials required for the integration to function (e.g. provider API keys, signing secrets). Only returned to dashboard/session-token callers; API-key authenticated callers receive th

fields.name: configurations
fields.description: The configurations required for enabling the additional configurations of the integration.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Indicates whether the integration is currently active. An active integration will process events and messages.

fields.name: deleted
fields.description: Indicates whether the integration has been marked as deleted (soft delete).

fields.name: deletedAt
fields.description: The timestamp indicating when the integration was deleted. This is set when the integration is soft deleted.

fields.name: deletedBy
fields.description: The identifier of the user who performed the deletion of this integration. Useful for audit trails.

fields.name: primary
fields.description: Indicates whether this integration is marked as primary. A primary integration is often the default choice for processing.

fields.name: conditions
fields.description: An array of conditions associated with the integration that may influence its behavior or processing logic.
